figmaApiFileId.description: The file ID for the Figma file to pull styles from

changelogFile.description: The CHANGELOG.md file to read and write overview of changes to

manifestFile.description: The manifest.json file to track illustration syncs.

generatedDirectory.description: The directory to output generated files.

prefix.description: Prefix to add to style name and generated css variables

syncAll.description: Sync all styles regardless of when they were last updated

exitOnBreakingChanges.description: Exit with an error when breaking changes are detected
